producer: demiurge RTSC §8.6 — hexa-rtsc verifier output → conductor handoff (thin adapter, M465). BCS gap-equation Newton solver. Closed-form anchor: Δ(0) = ℏω_D / sinh(1/λ); universal 2Δ(0)/kTc = π·e^{-γ_E}·φ(6) ≈ 3.528.

verifier.verifier_tier: T2 numerical (Newton solver leg of T2 ×3 stack)

spec.family_enum_note: ConductorMaterial = cu | nbti | nb3sn | rebco | bi2212 | rtsc_hypothetical (RTSC.md §5 Axis B / §8.6). Adapter records use rtsc_hypothetical for simulation-derived solver baselines — verifier output is computational lineage, not material characterization.
spec.compound_note: Simulation-derived solver baselines do not bind to a specific compound. The bcs solver exercises the universal BCS gap equation (Δ(0) = ℏω_D / sinh(1/λ)) parameterized by λ ∈ {0.3, 0.5, 1.0} at runtime. For per-material records, ingest a vendor-datasheet or external-paper record alongside this baseline.

jc_b_t_theta.description: Solver baseline records do not populate Jc(B,T,θ); that table comes from a vendor-datasheet or measurement-ingest record. Left null — see PR #90 sibling for the REBCO baseline schema.

provenance.source_citation: BCS gap-equation Newton solver. Closed-form anchor: Δ(0) = ℏω_D / sinh(1/λ); universal 2Δ(0)/kTc = π·e^{-γ_E}·φ(6) ≈ 3.528. Verifier: stdlib/rtsc/verify/numerics_bcs_solver.hexa — invocation `hexa run stdlib/rtsc/verify/numerics_bcs_solver.hexa`. Sentinel `__HEXA_RTSC_NUMERICS_BCS_SOLVER__ PASS` on success.
provenance.derive_chain: hexa-rtsc stdlib/rtsc/verify/numerics_bcs_solver.hexa -> RTSC/conductor/hexa_rtsc_baseline_adapter.hexa -> exports/conductor/hexa-rtsc-baseline/bcs/<stamp>/conductor_bcs.json -> (downstream) device producer reads nu[Coil]/Jc_limit/Hc2_limit when family is bound

gate_type_enum_note: gate_type in { vendor-datasheet | hexa-rtsc-derived | external-paper } per RTSC.md §8.5. Solver baselines are hexa-rtsc-derived — absorbed stays false permanently per the derived/sim contract.
scope_caveats: hexa-rtsc verifier output ingested · sim-derived · not wet-lab
Solver baseline — encodes verifier IDENTITY (pillar=sc, falsifiers=F-SC-{1,2,3}, sentinel) not a new numerical result. To re-run: hexa run stdlib/rtsc/verify/numerics_bcs_solver.hexa
absorbed=false permanent until an independent measurement record supersedes (RTSC.md §8.7 Tier-3).

family=rtsc_hypothetical — record is universal-form lineage (BCS gap equation), not a per-material characterization. For per-material binding, ingest a vendor-datasheet or measurement record alongside.
Sibling REBCO baseline at exports/conductor/hts_rebco/20260525T000000Z/conductor_rebco_hts_baseline.json (PR #90, also hexa-rtsc-derived, family=rebco).
r4_invariant: absorbed=false · provisional=true · gate_type=hexa-rtsc-derived · domain=conductor. R4 preserved — solver baseline is computational lineage, not measurement.
citations: RTSC.md §8.6 (hexa-rtsc thin adapter — M465 wired by this record)
RTSC.md §5 Axis B (ConductorMaterial enum, family slot)
PR #90 (exports/conductor/hts_rebco/ baseline schema exemplar — this record matches that schema)
